_comment: Sentinel config — loaded at startup, /reload to pick up changes.
interactive_commands: tools where specific flags/subcommands open an interactive UI.
tool_corrections: preferred tool replacements (blocked with suggestion).
always_interactive: commands that are always interactive (no flags needed).

squash.reason: Interactive diff selection. Use file paths instead.

split.reason: Interactive diff selection. Use separate commits.

commit.reason: Interactive diff selection. Use file paths instead.

restore.reason: Interactive diff selection. Use file paths instead.

exec.reason: Allocates interactive TTY. Use non-interactive: `docker exec <container> <cmd>`.

run.reason: Allocates interactive TTY. Use non-interactive: `docker run <image> <cmd>`.

exec.reason: Opens interactive shell in pod. Use: `kubectl exec <pod> -- <cmd>`.

attach.reason: Attaches to running process. Use `kubectl logs` instead.

repl.reason: Opens interactive REPL. Use `nix eval` instead.

mysql._doc: MySQL client — bare invocation is interactive

psql._doc: PostgreSQL client — bare invocation is interactive

sqlite3._doc: SQLite client — bare invocation without SQL is interactive

__base__.reason: Opens interactive shell. Pass SQL directly or use `.read`.
Opens interactive REPL. Use `elixir -e` or `mix run --eval`.

always_interactive._doc: Commands that are always interactive when invoked directly (no subcommand/flag needed).

tool_corrections._doc: Preferred tool replacements. Key = blocked command, value = preferred alternative.
